title: Get release body/notes
output:
## MCP Manager v1.0.0

Cross-platform MCP server management with multi-target export.

### Features

- Manage stdio, HTTP, SSE and Streamable HTTP MCP servers
- Export configs to Claude Code, Claude Desktop and OpenCode
- Per-target tool permission overrides (alwaysAllow)
- Transport auto-detection for HTTP endpoints
- Server testing and tool discovery via official MCP SDK
- Bridge support for Claude Desktop (mcp-proxy wrapping)
- Fluent-themed Avalonia GUI with MDI iconography

### Downloads

macOS DMGs will be attached automatically when the build completes.
